title: Interruptible Enemy State Machine
description: Create an enemy state machine with idle, patrol, investigate, chase, attack, and stunned states.
requirements: Every state must expose enter, update, and exit behaviour.
Stunned must be able to interrupt any active state.
Attack must respect both range and cooldown checks.
The state machine must reject invalid transitions safely.
Adding a new state must not require editing every existing state.
constraint: Dependencies must be supplied through a constructor or explicit initialisation method.
